title: chamaemelum nanum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile, also known as Roman chamomile, is a low-growing, perennial herb with daisy-like flowers that belong to the daisy family. Traditionally, Roman chamomile has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, soothing skin irritations, and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Roman chamomile include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Roman chamomile can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and salves, which can be used to promote relaxation, soothe skin conditions, and provide relief from digestive discomfort.
